selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 人, 人身, 人称
words.definition: n. a human being

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
n. 鼻子, 突出部分, 嗅觉；vt. 嗅到, 探出, 用鼻子触
words.definition: n. the organ of smell and entrance to the respiratory tract; the prominent part of the face of man or other mammals

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 行为, 举动, 指导；vt. 为人, 指挥, 管理, 实施
a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个
words.definition: s. (used with count nouns) of an indefinite number more than 2 or 3 but not many

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 西方, 西部；a. 西方的, 向西的
words.definition: n. the countries of (originally) Europe and (now including) North America and South America

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临
words.definition: n. the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 东方, 东；a. 东方的, 向东的
words.definition: n. the cardinal compass point that is at 90 degrees

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 母牛, 母兽；vt. 威胁
words.definition: n. female of domestic cattle: "`moo-cow' is a child's term"

words.translation: n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 船；vi. 乘船
words.definition: n. a small vessel for travel on water

words.translation: n. 盒子, 箱, 方框, 一巴掌；vt. 装...入盒中, 装箱, 打耳光
words.definition: n. a (usually rectangular) container; may have a lid

words.translation: vt. 烧, 烧毁, 烧伤；vi. 燃烧, 发热, 烧毁
n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职
words.definition: n. a seat for one person, with a support for the back

words.translation: n. 城市, 市
words.definition: n. a large and densely populated urban area; may include several independent administrative districts

words.translation: n. 傍晚, 晚间, 末期
words.definition: n. the latter part of the day (the period of decreasing daylight from late afternoon until nightfall)

words.translation: v. 检查, 调查, 考试
words.definition: v. observe, check out, and look over carefully or inspect

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 错误, 误会；vi. 犯错, 误认
words.definition: n. a wrong action attributable to bad judgment or ignorance or inattention

words.translation: n. 小人物, 无名小卒；pron. 无人, 没有人
n. 北方, 北；a. 北的, 北方的
words.definition: n. the region of the United States lying to the north of the Mason-Dixon line

words.translation: n. 大小, 尺寸, 规模, 尺码, 能力, 浆料；vt. 上浆, 依大小排列
words.definition: n. the physical magnitude of something (how big it is)

words.translation: n. 南方, 南；a. 南的, 向南的

words.translation: n. 天气, 气象, 处境；a. 迎风的
words.definition: n. the atmospheric conditions that comprise the state of the atmosphere in terms of temperature and wind and clouds and precipitation

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的

words.translation: a. 能干的, 能够的
words.definition: a. (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something

words.translation: vi. 同意, 赞成, 应允, 适合；vt. 承认, 认定, 同意
words.definition: v. be in accord; be in agreement

words.translation: n. 答案, 回答, 回报, 答辩；vt. 回答, 反驳, 适应, 响应, 符合
words.definition: n. a statement (either spoken or written) that is made to reply to a question or request or criticism or accusation

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的

words.translation: a. 完全的, 十足的, 完成的；vt. 完成, 完工, 使圆满
vi. 继续, 延续, 延长；vt. 使继续, 使延长
words.definition: v. continue a certain state, condition, or activity

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的

words.translation: n. 法律, 法则, 定律, 法律的制约, 法学, 司法界, 诉讼；v. 起诉

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的

words.translation: n. 经过, 要隘, 途径, 通行, 护照, 及格；vt. 经过, 越过, 通过, 批准, 度过, 传递, 忽略

words.translation: adv. 也许, 大概
adv. 宁可, 稍微, 相当

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
